productDisplayName: Nike Men's Splash Thong Black Red Flip Flop
description: flip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Splash Thong, true to its name, will add a splash of color to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any kind of casual outfits. Upper Broad straps for improved comfortSynthetic woven straps for durabilityWoven toe separator for beter gripStrap backing made of synthetic leather with velvety feel for enhanced comfortAppliqued logoStitched detailing on straps for added style Midsole Foam footbed for all day comfortLogo on heelThong construction to hold the forefoot in place Outsole Herringbone pattern for good grip shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
